name: nusuk-social-tracker-v2
description: Internal Nusuk Card social/news mention tracker — audit-grade capture with Arabic rendering fidelity.

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm -w schemas run build && npm -w src run build && npm -w web run build
scripts.test: echo "unit tests added in later phases" && exit 0
